name: Korea Research Map all-assets manifest
purpose: Single machine-readable inventory so crawlers, AI agents, RAG ingestors, and dataset catalogs can discover every repository asset with GitHub Pages and raw.githubusercontent.com fallback URLs.
required_framing: Research commentary only; not investment advice.
Survivor stack is not a buy list.
Moonshot names are research prompts only.
X/Twitter is paused for this wave; use repo-hosted non-X discovery surfaces.
